title: DaveTryLive Community Modpack
description: A lightweight community modpack for Forge 1.20.1 with focus on performance, comfort and multiplayer features like claims, minimap, backpacks and item saving.
body:
# 📦 DaveTryLive Community Modpack  
**Forge 1.20.1** | Performance, Comfort & Expansions

A well-balanced modpack for vanilla-like survival with practical additions.  
The focus is on **performance**, **quality-of-life features**, and **easy expandability** – without bloated tech mods.

---

## ✅ Highlights

- 🛡️ Automatic player claims (*Open Parties and Claims*)  
- ⚰️ Item protection on death (*GraveStone Mod*)  
- 🗺️ Minimap & World map (*Xaero’s Mods*)  
- 🎒 Expandable backpacks (*Sophisticated Backpacks*)  
- 💡 Performance tweaks: *Embeddium*, *Sodium (Forge)*, *Dynamic Lights*, *Oculus*  
- 🔧 QoL & UI: *JEI*, *Controlling*, *Zoom*, *ClientSort*, *Searchables*

---

## 📚 Included Mods

| Mod | Link |
|-----|------|
| [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) | API compatibility |
| [Better Mods Button](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mods-button) | Clear mod list UI |
| [Chisel Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/chisel-reborn) | Decorative building blocks |
| [ClientSort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort) | Inventory sorting |
| [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) | Configuration backend |
| [Concentration](https://modrinth.com/mod/concentration) | Mod compatibility |
| [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) | Seamless lighting transitions |
| [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) | Keybind search |
| [Cryonic Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cryonic-config) | Configuration system |
| [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) | Expandable equipment slots |
| [Decocraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/decocraft) | Decorative objects and furniture |
| [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) | Sodium optimization for Forge |
| [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) | Farming & cooking system |
| [Fabric API (Forge-Port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | Compatibility layer |
| [Fullbright Multiplayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fullbright) | Permanent night vision |
| [GraveStone Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestones) | Item protection on death |
| [JEI - Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) | Recipe viewing |
| [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) | Individually generated loot |
| [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) | Shader support |
| [Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims) | Land claim management |
| [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables) | Chest search functionality |
| [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) | In-game voice chat |
| [Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) | Network compatibility |
| [Sodium Dynamic Lights (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) | Dynamic handheld light sources |
| [Sodium Options API](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodiumoptions-api-forge) | GUI for performance settings |
| [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) | Expandable backpacks |
| [Sophisticated Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core) | Required for Backpacks |
| [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers) | Compact item storage |
| [WI-Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom) | Scroll-to-zoom |
| [Xaero’s Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) | Compact minimap |
| [Xaero’s World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) | Full-screen world map with waypoints |

---

## 📘 License Notes

- All included mods are used **unmodified**.  
- Usage complies **fully with each respective license**.  
- **All mods are permitted for modpack use according to Modrinth or the developer's documentation.**

---

🫶 Huge thanks to all mod creators!  
Please support them on Modrinth with a star ⭐ or a follow.
